'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is the Gym Leader of [[Oxalis Gym]] in [[Naljo]], specializing in Fire-type Pokémon. He is battled only in [[Pokémon Prism]] and is the first Gym leader the player faces in the game. ==Battles== {{PAGENAME}} is battled twice: first as the leader of [[Oxalis Gym|his own gym]], and then later as a trainer in the [[Spurge Gym]] with a stronger team. ===Oxalis City Gym=== {{Party/HeaderPrism |Sprite=Josiah.png |Class=Leader |Name=[[Josiah]] |Location=Oxalis City |Prize=1200 and
[[TMs (Prism)|TM82]] (Will-O-Wisp) |Pokemon=2}} {{Party/Pokemon |Pokemon 1 Image = {{Icon|Charmander}} |Pokemon 1 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 1 Name = Charmander |Pokemon 1 Level = 10 |Pokemon 1 Ability = Blaze |Pokemon 1 Move 1 = Ember |Pokemon 1 Move 2 = Scratch |Pokemon 1 Move 3 = Sunny Day |Pokemon 1 Move 4 = Metal Claw |Pokemon 2 Image = {{Icon|Slugma}} |Pokemon 2 Gender = {{Male}} |Pokemon 2 Name = Slugma |Pokemon 2 Level = 12 |Pokemon 2 Ability = Magma Armor |Pokemon 2 Move 1 = Ember |Pokemon 2 Move 2 = Rock Throw |Pokemon 2 Move 3 = Sunny Day |Pokemon 2 Move 4 = Smog}} |}
